mapper.select: SELECT ATTENDANCE_ID AS attendanceId, EMPLOYEE_ID AS employeeId, WORK_DATE AS workDate, CHECK_IN_TIME AS checkInTime, CHECK_OUT_TIME AS checkOutTime, ATTENDANCE_STATUS AS attendanceStatus FROM ATTENDANCE WHERE EMPLOYEE_ID = #{employeeId} AND WORK_DATE = #{today}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ATTENDANCE (EMPLOYEE_ID, WORK_DATE, CHECK_IN_TIME, ATTENDANCE_STATUS) VALUES (#{employeeId}, #{today}, #{checkInTime}, #{status})
